# Vizly — Learn Through Visuals

> Interactive visual guides and articles about system design, security, AI, and engineering concepts. Each guide features animated flows, mermaid diagrams, and step-by-step explanations.

## Learning Paths

- [Become an AI Engineer](/learning-paths/ai-engineer): A complete learning path from zero to shipping AI in production. 7 series, ~10 weeks.

## Series

- [AI Fundamentals](/series/ai-fundamentals): A ground-up journey through AI, ML, deep learning, and neural networks. 6 articles.
- [Transformers & LLMs](/series/transformers-llms): From attention mechanisms to text generation — how modern language models actually work under the hood. 6 articles.

## Articles

- [What is AI? From Rules to Learning](/articles/what-is-ai): AI vs ML vs DL vs GenAI, brief history, why now.
- [How Machines Learn](/articles/how-machines-learn): Supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement learning, train/test split.
- [Neural Networks from Scratch](/articles/neural-networks-from-scratch): Perceptron, layers, activation functions, forward pass.
- [Backpropagation & Training](/articles/backpropagation-and-training): Loss functions, gradient descent, learning rate, epochs.
- [CNNs & Computer Vision](/articles/cnns-and-computer-vision): Convolutions, pooling, feature maps.
- [RNNs & Sequential Data](/articles/rnns-and-sequential-data): Why sequence matters, vanishing gradients, LSTM/GRU.
- [Attention Is All You Need](/articles/attention-is-all-you-need): Self-attention, multi-head attention, why it replaced RNNs.
- [The Transformer Architecture](/articles/the-transformer-architecture): Encoder-decoder, positional encoding, layer norm, feed-forward networks.
- [Tokenization](/articles/tokenization): BPE, WordPiece, SentencePiece, vocabulary building.
- [Pre-Training LLMs](/articles/pre-training-llms): Data collection, cleaning, next-token prediction, scaling laws.
- [GPT, LLaMA & Model Families](/articles/gpt-llama-and-model-families): Decoder-only vs encoder-decoder, model zoo, parameter counts.
- [Text Generation Strategies](/articles/text-generation-strategies): Greedy, beam search, top-k, top-p, temperature.

## Guides — System Design

- [Load Balancing](/guides/load-balancing): Round-robin, least connections, IP hash, weighted strategies.
- [Caching Strategies](/guides/caching-strategies): Cache-aside, write-through, write-back, read-through.
- [CDN](/guides/cdn): Content delivery networks, edge caching, origin servers.
- [API Gateway](/guides/api-gateway): Routing, rate limiting, authentication, load balancing.
- [Rate Limiter](/guides/rate-limiter): Token bucket, sliding window, fixed window algorithms.
- [Circuit Breaker](/guides/circuit-breaker): Closed, open, half-open states for fault tolerance.
- [Service Discovery](/guides/service-discovery): Client-side vs server-side, service registries.
- [Message Queues](/guides/message-queues): Point-to-point, pub/sub, message brokers.
- [Event-Driven Architecture](/guides/event-driven-architecture): Event sourcing, CQRS, event buses.
- [Consistent Hashing](/guides/consistent-hashing): Hash rings, virtual nodes, rebalancing.
- [Proxy Servers](/guides/proxy-servers): Forward proxy, reverse proxy, load balancers.
- [CAP Theorem](/guides/cap-theorem): Consistency, availability, partition tolerance tradeoffs.
- [Microservices Architecture](/guides/microservices-architecture): Service decomposition, communication patterns.
- [Monolithic Architecture](/guides/monolithic-architecture): Single deployable unit, when monoliths make sense.
- [Serverless Architecture](/guides/serverless-architecture): FaaS, BaaS, cold starts, scaling.
- [Client-Server Architecture](/guides/client-server-architecture): Request-response model, thick vs thin clients.
- [Stateful vs Stateless](/guides/stateful-stateless-architecture): Session management, horizontal scaling implications.
- [Vertical vs Horizontal Scaling](/guides/vertical-horizontal-scaling): Scale up vs scale out strategies.

## Guides — Database

- [Database Replication](/guides/database-replication): Leader-follower, multi-leader, leaderless replication.
- [Database Sharding](/guides/database-sharding): Range, hash, directory-based sharding strategies.
- [Database Indexing](/guides/database-indexing): B-tree, hash, composite indexes, query optimization.

## Guides — Auth & Security

- [JWT](/guides/jwt): JSON Web Tokens, claims, signing, verification flow.
- [OAuth 2.0](/guides/oauth): Authorization code, implicit, client credentials flows.

## Guides — Programming

- [OOP](/guides/oop): Encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, abstraction.
- [Big O Notation](/guides/big-onotation): Time and space complexity analysis.
- [Bloom Filters](/guides/bloom-filters): Probabilistic data structures, false positives, use cases.

## About

Vizly is built by [Md Obydullah](https://github.com/mdobydullah). Source code: [github.com/mdobydullah/vizly](https://github.com/mdobydullah/vizly).
